iti64:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti64:2.1: “Monks, there are these three kinds of misconduct.
iti64:2.3: Bodily misconduct, verbal misconduct, mental misconduct.
iti64:2.4: These are the three kinds of misconduct.”
iti64:4.1: not having done what is skillful,
iti64:4.2: having done much that is not,
iti64:4.3: at the break-up of the body,
iti64:4.4: the undiscerning one reappears in hell.
